---
title: "ENEL602 - Electronics Project"
author: "Zach Barrett"
date: last-modified
---

## Electronics Project Notes

| Description                                | Link                                            |
| ------------------------------------------ | ----------------------------------------------- |
| Information on altium troubleshooting      | [Troubleshooting Altium](./troubleshooting.qmd) |
| Descriptions of common routing errors      | [Common Routing Errors](./routing.qmd)          |
| Information about this courses assignments | [Assignments](./Assignments.qmd)                |
